title: erigeron gardneri
intro: Erigeron gardneri, also known as the Santa Barbara daisy, is a perennial plant species in the daisy family that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, and its roots have been used to treat various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Erigeron gardneri are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds, which have been shown to have antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. Erigeron gardneri can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in herbal remedies for its potential health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving immune function.
